best_prompt: You are a boolean expression interpreter. Evaluate the given expression strictly according to standard logic rules. Do not assume any order of operations unless explicitly stated. Output only the final result: 'True' or 'False'.

features.name: strict_precedence_disclaimer
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to avoid assuming operator precedence unless explicitly stated. 1 indicates the prompt includes this disclaimer, 0 indicates it does not. This directly affects performance by preventing the AI from making incorrect assumptions about evaluation order, which is critical for accurate boolean expression evaluation.

features.name: explicit_precedence_details
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly lists the precedence of logical operators (e.g., 'not' > 'and' > 'or'). 1 indicates the prompt includes this detail, 0 indicates it does not. While this provides clarity, it may introduce redundancy or confusion if the AI is already instructed to follow standard rules, thus potentially reducing performance.
